name: Smoky Pumpkin Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 cups pumpkin, peeled, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the bacon fat and butter in a stockpot over medium-high heat.
2. Add the pumpkin and sauté for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Pour in the beef stock and simmer, covered, until the pumpkin is very tender, about 30 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in the Marsala wine, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Process the soup in batches in a blender until smooth.
6. Return to the stockpot. Add the bacon back into the pot.
7. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with toasted pumpkin seeds.
